packageRules.description: One combined PR for every dependency across nuget, npm, and github-actions — Paul merges a single PR.
@types/vscode MUST stay <= engines.vscode (^1.85.0) or `vsce package` refuses to package the extension (broke publish runs #154/#155). Bump it manually only when raising the engines floor.
@types/node tracks the extension-host / CI Node runtime (20.x). Hold it on that major; allow minor/patch.
typescript majors (6.x) drop the node global typings under module:Node16 and break tsc (broke publish runs #154/#155). Allow minor/patch only.
